original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求多添加一点元素充实画面，文案：玄墨凝瑞，静心绕腕
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese Zen E-commerce scenario, Premium Commercial Photography style. The [Subject Lock: circular beaded bracelet with high-gloss black obsidian beads, one peach agate bead, and one teal cloisonné lotus bead] is placed centrally on a textured dark slate stone slab or a rough-hewn wooden podium. 
[Props]: To enrich the scene as requested, add wisps of white incense smoke curling gently around the bracelet to create a mystical atmosphere. Place a blurred dried pine branch or a small antique inkstone in the background to add cultural depth. 
[Background]: Deep charcoal and ink-wash style gradient background, evoking a sense of tranquility. 
Lighting is dramatic 'Rembrandt Lighting' mixed with commercial softbox, highlighting the glossy reflection of the black beads and the gold details on the cloisonné bead.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “玄墨凝瑞”. Position: [Top Right Negative Space]. Style: [3D Calligraphic brush stroke font in Gold or White].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “静心绕腕”. Style: [Clean Serif font, vertical layout or smaller horizontal below main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “新中式美学”. Style: [Vertical Red Seal Stamp style].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “甄选好物”. Style: [Minimalist Gold Line Border Circle].
layout_logic: Since the product is a bracelet (circular), a centered composition works best for stability. Place the bracelet on a textured surface (slate/wood) in the lower-middle 1/3 of the frame. Use the requested 'enriched elements' (smoke, pine, inkstone) to frame the product peripherally, ensuring they do not overlap the beads. The provided text '玄墨凝瑞' has a poetic, vertical quality, so consider placing the text vertically in the top-right corner (traditional Chinese reading direction) or horizontally in the top-left negative space to balance the visual weight.
